While they've been known for their defense, Como 1907 are now making waves upfront, boasting two players, Anastasios Douvikas and Nico Paz, in Serie A's top five goal scorers!
Bayern Munich's incredible +72 goal difference after 27 Bundesliga matches is more than double that of second-placed Borussia Dortmund (+30)!

Paris Saint-Germain is truly showing why they're top of Ligue 1, leading the league in both goals scored (58) and fewest goals conceded (22) after 26 matches!
Surprise package! Joaquín Panichelli is absolutely flying for Strasbourg, leading the Ligue 1 goal-scoring charts with an impressive 16 goals!

Think high-line pressing is a new trend? 🤔 Rewind to Arrigo Sacchi's AC Milan. His revolutionary zonal marking and aggressive offside trap in the late 80s didn't just win trophies; they broke brains and changed defensive tactics forever. Pure tactical terrorism! #FootballHistory #SerieA #Tactics

HUGE win for Rayo Vallecano! 🤩 They battled a 10-man Elche to secure vital breathing room in their push for European football! Every point counts in #LaLiga. What a performance! #RayoVallecano #EuropeanFootball

STOP THE NONSENSE! Gerrard vs Lampard, the endless argument. But who was the more lethal midfield scorer? Frank Lampard delivered 15+ PL goals in FOUR different seasons. Steven Gerrard? Only ONE. History shows us who truly owned the box. No debate needed. #PremierLeague #ChelseaFC #LFC #FootballFacts

Before Messi & Ronaldo, there was King George.

George Weah at AC Milan wasn't just good, he was a force of nature. Power, pace, skill – he had it all. 1995 Ballon d'Or winner, the ONLY African to achieve it. Remember that goal vs Verona? Ran the length of the pitch. An absolute legend who paved the way. Underrated.
